description: Create, edit, and run Jupyter notebooks with Claude
long_description:
nteract brings Jupyter notebooks to Claude. Create notebooks, execute Python and Deno code, visualize data with matplotlib/plotly/seaborn, manage dependencies, and see rich outputs — all from your Claude conversation.

Features:
- Create and open .ipynb notebooks
- Execute code cells with inline output rendering
- Manage Python dependencies (add, remove, sync)
- Real-time presence — see Claude's cursor in the notebook app
- Works with the nteract desktop app for side-by-side editing
name: nteract-nightly

tools.description: List running notebook sessions.
tools.name: list_active_notebooks

tools.description: Open a notebook. Provide exactly one of: path (file path, e.g. "~/analysis.ipynb") or notebook_id (UUID from list_active_notebooks). Paths open the file from disk; notebook_id connects to a running session.
tools.name: open_notebook

tools.description: Create a new notebook. Ephemeral by default; use save_notebook(path) to persist.
tools.name: create_notebook

tools.description: Save notebook to disk. For notebooks created with create_notebook(), you must provide a path.
tools.name: save_notebook

tools.description: Show the current notebook to the user.
tools.name: launch_app

tools.description: Get a cell by ID.
tools.name: get_cell

tools.description: Get all cells as summary, json, or rich format.
tools.name: get_all_cells

tools.description: Create a cell, optionally executing it.
tools.name: create_cell

tools.description: Replace a cell's source or type.
tools.name: set_cell

tools.description: Delete a cell.
tools.name: delete_cell

tools.description: Move a cell to a new position.
tools.name: move_cell

tools.description: Clear cell outputs.
tools.name: clear_outputs

tools.description: Add tags to a cell.
tools.name: add_cell_tags

tools.description: Remove tags from a cell.
tools.name: remove_cell_tags

tools.description: Hide or show cell source.
tools.name: set_cells_source_hidden

tools.description: Hide or show cell outputs.
tools.name: set_cells_outputs_hidden

tools.description: Execute a code cell.
tools.name: execute_cell

tools.description: Execute all code cells in order.
tools.name: run_all_cells

tools.description: Interrupt execution.
tools.name: interrupt_kernel

tools.description: Restart the kernel, clearing all state.
tools.name: restart_kernel

tools.description: Add a package. Use after='sync' or 'restart' to apply.
tools.name: add_dependency

tools.description: Remove a package. Requires kernel restart to take effect.
tools.name: remove_dependency

tools.description: Get the notebook's declared dependencies.
tools.name: get_dependencies

tools.description: Hot-install new dependencies. restart_kernel() if this fails.
tools.name: sync_environment

tools.description: Replace literal text in a cell. Use context_before/context_after to disambiguate repeated matches.
tools.name: replace_match

tools.description: Replace a regex match in a cell (fancy-regex). Fails if 0 or >1 matches. Replacement is literal text.
tools.name: replace_regex
